relations: Storytelling is a fundamental aspect of human culture, shaping our understanding of the world through narrative engagement and emotional response.
Storytelling utilizes narratives to convey its messages and engage the audience.
One of the goals of storytelling is to evoke an emotional response from the audience, making the narrative more impactful and memorable.
